ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., Point Guard, Shooting Guard) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years the player has been in the league */,
  "college" TEXT /* College/university the player attended */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Date the player's current contract expires */,
  "salary" REAL /* Player's current salary */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Player's social media handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "location" TEXT /* City and state where the team is located */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Team's social media handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs, exhibition) */,
  "game_result_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the game result (e.g., score, overtime) */,
  "game_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who achieved the statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic was achieved in */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Number of minutes the player played */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Number of points the player scored */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers the player made */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds the player had */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists the player had */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals the player had */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks the player had */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the player */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers the player had */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls the player committed */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating of the player */,
  "points_per_minute" REAL /* Points scored per minute played */,
  "rebounds_per_minute" REAL /* Rebounds per minute played */,
  "assists_per_minute" REAL /* Assists per minute played */,
  "steals_per_minute" REAL /* Steals per minute played */,
  "blocks_per_minute" REAL /* Blocks per minute played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value rating */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who achieved the value rating */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the value rating was achieved in */,
  "value_rating" REAL /* Value rating of the player in the game */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of value rating (e.g., overall, offensive, defensive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_values_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_values_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "three_point_values" (
  "three_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each three-point value rating */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who achieved the three-point value rating */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the three-point value rating was achieved in */,
  "three_point_value" REAL /* Three-point value rating of the player in the game */,
  "three_point_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of three-point attempts */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point shooting percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("three_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_three_point_values_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_three_point_values_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rebound_values" (
  "rebound_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rebound value rating */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who achieved the rebound value rating */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the rebound value rating was achieved in */,
  "rebound_value" REAL /* Rebound value rating of the player in the game */,
  "offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of offensive rebounds */,
  "defensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of defensive rebounds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rebound_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rebound_values_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rebound_values_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assist_values" (
  "assist_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assist value rating */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who achieved the assist value rating */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the assist value rating was achieved in */,
  "assist_value" REAL /* Assist value rating of the player in the game */,
  "secondary_assists" INTEGER /* Number of secondary assists */,
  "potential_assists" INTEGER /* Number of potential assists */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assist_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assist_values_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assist_values_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "steal_values" (
  "steal_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each steal value rating */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who achieved the steal value rating */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the steal value rating was achieved in */,
  "steal_value" REAL /* Steal value rating of the player in the game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Average steals per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("steal_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_steal_values_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_steal_values_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
